mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT project_code AS projectCode, project_name AS projectName, created_on AS createdOn, status AS projectStatusCode FROM vw_user_auth WHERE user_code = #{userCode} AND ( status = 'OD1' OR (status = 'OD3' AND admin_ck = 'Y') ) ORDER BY project_name
SELECT project_code AS projectCode, project_name AS projectName, admin_ck AS adminCk FROM vw_user_auth WHERE user_code = #{userCode} AND status = 'OD1' ORDER BY project_name
SELECT DISTINCT project_code AS projectCode, project_name AS projectName FROM vw_user_auth WHERE user_code = #{userCode} AND status = 'OD1' AND admin_ck = 'Y' ORDER BY project_name
